# Secret Layer

> The warm-up layer B2B funnels are missing. We build the middle of your funnel — website, AI tools, content, SEO, AEO, email nurture, attribution — as one bundled 12-month engagement.

## Who we serve

B2B companies past $500K ARR or post-seed. SaaS, B2B products, services, agencies. Founder-led teams with traffic but a thin middle-of-funnel.

## Who we don't serve

- Consulting firms → we route them to our sister studio Indlead (indlead.com)
- Pre-revenue / under $500K ARR
- Ecommerce, D2C, local services
- Teams looking for tactical one-off sprints

## What we build

Fifteen disciplines across three groups, bundled into one engagement:

- **Web Strategy:** Conversion Strategy, Website Design, Webflow Development, Interactive AI Tools, Lead Magnets
- **Growth Strategy:** SEO Strategy, AEO Strategy, Social Media Strategy, Content Marketing, Email Marketing
- **AI Automation:** Analytics & Attribution, Workflow Automations, AI Agents, Content Automation, Integrations & APIs

## Pricing

- Setup: $15,000 (one-time, 50% on kickoff, 50% on site launch)
- Retainer: $5,000 per 28 days (starts at site launch)
- Engagement: 12 months
- Total 12-month investment: ~$80,000

## Guarantee

10 qualified leads in 90 days — or we work free until we hit it. Miss at 180 days: full refund of everything paid plus a $2K penalty.

## Team

Two humans plus AI. Stefan Popadic (strategy, design, AI, copy, sales). Nenad Popadic (Webflow development, engineering).
